How it works

Dinner, your way in 3 simple steps

1

Add your ingredients

Manually add or scan your pantry to see what you have.

Try it →
2

Get recipe ideas

We'll suggest recipes you can make with what's on hand.

Try it →
3

Cook & enjoy

Follow easy steps, shop missing items, and enjoy.

Try it →
